sentences.arabic: يُمَثِّلُ الْخَطُّ الْعَرَبِيُّ فَنًّا جَمِيلًا يَعْكِسُ جَمَالَ اللُّغَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kaligrafija predstavlja lijepu umjetnost koja odražava ljepotu jezika.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic calligraphy represents a beautiful art that reflects the beauty of the language.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْخَطَّاطُونَ أَقْلَامًا خَاصَّةً وَحِبْرًا لِرَسْمِ الْحُرُوفِ.
sentences.translation: Kaligrafi koriste posebne olovke i tintu za crtanje slova.
sentences.translationEn: Calligraphers use special pens and ink to draw letters.

sentences.arabic: نَرَى هَذَا الْفَنَّ عَلَى جُدْرَانِ الْمَسَاجِدِ وَفِي الْكُتُبِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vidimo ovu umjetnost na zidovima džamija i u starim knjigama.
sentences.translationEn: We see this art on the walls of mosques and in old books.

sentences.arabic: هُنَاكَ أَنْوَاعٌ كَثِيرَةٌ مِنَ الْخُطُوطِ مِثْلُ الْكُوفِيِّ وَالنَّسْخِ.
sentences.translation: Postoje mnoge vrste pisama kao što su kufsko i neshi.
sentences.translationEn: There are many types of scripts such as Kufic and Naskh.

sentences.arabic: يَهْتَمُّ الْعَالَمُ الْيَوْمَ بِتَعَلُّمِ هَذَا الْفَنِّ الْأَصِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Svijet je danas zainteresovan za učenje ove izvorne umjetnosti.
sentences.translationEn: The world today is interested in learning this authentic art.
